name: tk-generator
description: Генератор технологических карт (ТК+МК) для изделий из натурального камня

scripts.test: node tests/excel-import.test.js && node tests/unit-normalizer.test.js && node tests/cost-calculator.test.js && node tests/export-1c.test.js && node tests/overrides-loader.test.js && node tests/texture-validation.test.js && node tests/plugin-loader.test.js && node tests/validation.test.js && node tests/config.test.js && node tests/template-engine.test.js && node tests/smoke/generate-docx.test.js && node tests/smoke/generate-pdf.test.js && node tests/smoke/generate-rkm.test.js && node tests/data-integrity.test.js && node tests/smoke/summary-report.test.js && node tests/api/validate.test.js && node tests/api/generate.test.js && node tests/api/history.test.js && node tests/db/repository.test.js && node tests/api/auth.test.js && node tests/api/swagger.test.js && node tests/self-update.test.js
scripts.smoke: node tests/smoke/generate-docx.test.js && node tests/smoke/generate-rkm.test.js && node tests/smoke/summary-report.test.js
scripts.test:e2e: node tests/e2e/cli.test.js && node tests/e2e/api.test.js && node tests/e2e/electron.test.js && node tests/e2e/telegram.test.js
scripts.lint: eslint src tests || npx --yes eslint@9.39.4 src tests
scripts.lint:fix: eslint src tests --fix || npx --yes eslint@9.39.4 src tests --fix
